title: homalobus debilis
side_effects: Homalobus debilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its high toxicity. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can also cause abdominal pain, headaches, and dizziness. Long-term exposure to the plant's chemicals may lead to more severe complications, including kidney damage and respiratory problems. Additionally, improper use of Homalobus debilis can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation and swelling.
